requirements.raw_text: Generate a clean standard agent contract.

requirements.raw_text: Generate complete Vibe Coding infrastructure repository files.

requirements.raw_text: Keep generated artifacts free of source-tracing markers.

Infrastructure must include import, search, answer, evidence, and traceability for a dedicated knowledge base/RAG layer.
